arguments.argument:
event_inherited() image_speed=0.3
//Enemy base statistics eName="Winged Melon" eLevel=30 maxLife=200 life=maxLife pointWorth=15 atkPower=9 baseItemChance=50 stunResist=50 affiliation=1
initDir=0 runAcc=1.5
jeremyText="It's a... flying watermelon... and labelled under Mario? Oh hey, didn't Mario Sunshine have some watermelon thing? Oh geez, I don't remember." chaoText="This sprite was made by a turnip named Rena (aka Tavi). Huh, didn't know turnips had names." devText="No Dev Commentary at this time."
